stories.headline: Civilians or Hezbollah: Who did Israel hit on Lebanon’s ‘Black Wednesday’?
stories.description: Israel says it targeted Hezbollah, but experts say the evidence proves otherwise.

stories.headline: Rise in caesarean section births in Gaza brings danger and infection risks
stories.description: Caesarean Awareness Month is marked in April. Conditions in Gaza can lead to risks for mothers who undergo the procedure

stories.headline: Environmental disaster fears grip Russia as Ukraine targets oil refineries
stories.description: Ukrainian forces have hammered one of Russia’s largest sites in Tuapse, causing oil spills and black rain.

stories.headline: Anger at FA over apparent denial of heading and brain injury link
stories.description: Campaigners are disgusted the FA has apparently denied a link between heading the ball and brain injuries.

stories.headline: Press freedom worldwide falls to its lowest level in 25 years
stories.description: Reporters Without Borders warns that ‘journalism is increasingly criminalised worldwide’.
